ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar May-09-2016 Continued To May-23-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Attorney Steven Weinkauf to appear on May 23, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why he was not present at the hearing and to provide direct notice to beneficiaries Diane Liebling and Morton Jacobs. The status hearing is also continued to that date.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Barrientos. (Not Reported)

Judge: Paul H. Alvarado. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy Robles. (Not reported)

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Nov-23-2015 Continued To Dec-21-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Evyn Shomer specially appeared for Steve Weinkauf for the San Francisco Public Administrator. Guilio Accornero for (heirs) Diane Liebling and Morton Jacobs.

The Court asked why the supplemental declaration did not get filed. Ms. Shomer stated that she is not certain, that the examiner's notes do not always get to the correct attorney and requested a 30 day continuance. Mr. Accornero stated that he has been requesting notes and that this estate has been dragging on. The accounting petition was continued to December 21, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Lynn O'Malley Taylor. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares. (Not Reported)

The Court stated that the matter was on for hearing to see if anyone was appearing or objecting. The Court granted the Petition to Determine Those Persons Entitled to Distribution of Estate (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (1932 Great Highway, San Francisco Ca., 94116)
Off Calendar Sep-23-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Steven Weinkauf for San Francisco Public Administrator (Petitioner).

The sale was confirmed at $707,000.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to review of the order). 5% commission is allowed. Bond is not required.

Judge: Lillian K. Sing. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy Watts. (Not Reported)

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Mar-05-2013 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Feb-11-2013 Continued To Mar-05-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Steven Weinkauff for San Francisco Public Administrator.

Mr. Weinkauff stated that he read the Power of Attorney, that he doesn't have any doubt that the Daughter has authority to represent her Father and that there are other family members. Mr. Weinkauff also read some of the language in the Power of Attorney and pointed out that the only restriction was that the Daughter can not change trust or testamentary documents. The Petition for Letters of Administration was taken under submission.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy M. Benton.
